sections.label: 1. Call the regular meeting to order. 7:00 P.M.
a. Public hearing on the Fern Street Connector Path project. (No Council action).

b. Public hearing and Council action on an ordinance amending Chapter 102 (Utilities), Article II (Fees and Charges), Section 102-33, pertaining to sanitary sewer connection fees, frontage charges and wastewater lateral repair and replacement charges, and
c. Public hearing and Council action on an ordinance adopting printed Supplement Numbers 16 to 26, inclusive, to the Code of the City of Fairfax, Virginia.

d. Public hearing and Council action on an ordinance amending Chapter 2 (Administration), Article III (Officers and Employees), Division 2 (Disclosure of Interests), pertaining to required financial disclosures by certain enumerated officers and employees
e. Public hearing and Council action on a grant supplemental appropriation resolution in the amount of $4,600,000 for Transform 66 Outside the Beltway Concession Funding for the George Snyder Trail.
a. Consideration of an award of a construction contract for the George Snyder Trail project. Consideration of a resolution to cancel the George Snyder Trail Project (VDOT UPC 112816).As a resu

8. Second general public comment period (a maximum of three (3) minutes per speaker for any city matters not requiring a public hearing – limited to speakers who did not speak under initial general public comment period).
12. Council Comments and Committee reports out (if needed).
